div.div:
Resilience Notes:
• Circuit breaker: DDB fail → fall back to Aurora (300ms)
• Retry: exponential backoff with jitter (base 100ms × 2^n)
• Payment idempotency: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING + Redis (48h TTL)
• DLQ: redrive up to 3x, dead-letter to S3, alert if >10 in DLQ >1h

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 106px; margin-left: 183px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #57606A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#57606A, #969da6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
C4 Model — Container Diagram (Level 2):
Shows the high-level containers (services, databases, queues)
within the Parking Lot System boundary and the relationships between them.
